ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "twitter_id" TEXT /* Twitter ID of the tweet */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was released */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the tweet was posted */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the tweet */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the tweet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the tweet */,
  "stance" TEXT /* Stance of the tweet (e.g., comment, claim) */,
  "fact_check_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fact check associated with the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains sensitive content */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet might contain sensitive content */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment analysis of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_fact_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("fact_check_id") REFERENCES fact_checks ("fact_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user follows */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is protected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fact_checks" (
  "fact_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact check */,
  "claim" TEXT /* Claim made in the tweet */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the claim (e.g., True, False, Mostly True) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the fact check */,
  "fact_checker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fact checker who performed the check */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the fact-check rating */,
  "date_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the fact check was performed */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the fact check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fact_checks_fact_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("fact_checker_id") REFERENCES fact_checkers ("fact_checker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fact_checkers" (
  "fact_checker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact checker */,
  "fact_checker_name" TEXT /* Name of the fact checker */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the fact checker belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the fact checker */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the fact checker */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating for the fact checker based on their performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_checker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet being replied to */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_time" TEXT /* Time the reply was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the reply */,
  "reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being replied to */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment analysis of the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_reply_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet being retweeted */,
  "retweet_time" TEXT /* Time the retweet was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who retweeted the tweet */,
  "original_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original tweet being retweeted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_original_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet being liked */,
  "like_time" TEXT /* Time the like was given */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who liked the tweet */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to like the tweet (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet where the hashtag is used */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score for the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being mentioned */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet where the mention is made */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* Text of the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent topic (for hierarchical topics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "tweet_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-topic association */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., Topic, Hashtag) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trend is popular */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of tweets associated with the trend */,
  "peak_time" TEXT /* Peak time of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_tweets" (
  "trend_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend-tweet association */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trend */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the tweet within the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_tweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_tweets_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
